api_key.description: Lago API key. Used only for Bearer auth (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>); never logged.

api_url.description: Lago API base URL override for tests, self-hosted instances, or proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
